Particle Uptake Studies by Rat Alveolar Macrophages.
In
this set of experiments, we have studied the influence of particle size
on the uptake by alveolar macrophages, an antigen presenting cell.
This study was also designed to indirectly rule in or rule out if the
uptake by dendritic cells has any contribution to generation of
immune response. For this study, we used particles of two different
size ranges: (i) NP-F-1 with a diameter of ∼1-1.5 μm and (ii) NP-
F-2 with a diameter of NP-F-2 ∼700-750 nm. These two size
